texto: There's no work so tirin' as danglin' about an' starin' an' not rightly knowin' what you're goin' to do next
autor: and keepin' your face i' smilin' order like a grocer o' market-day for fear people shouldna think you civil enough.
explicacao: Citação de and keepin' your face i' smilin' order like a grocer o' market-day for fear people shouldna think you civil enough. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “There's no work so tirin' as danglin' about an' starin' an' not rightly knowin' what you're goin'…” articula trabalho, george-eliot, adam-bede em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e adam-bede.
